---
title: "UIAO OrgTree Drift Engine Configuration"
subtitle: "Schema Reference · drift-engine-config.schema.json"
date: 2026-05-14
---

::: {.callout-note}
## Developer Reference

This is a UIAO JSON Schema, rendered as a developer-reference page per
[ADR-068](../../adr/adr-068-canon-publication-policy.qmd).

- **Source:** [`src/uiao/schemas/orgpath/drift-engine-config.schema.json`](../../../src/uiao/schemas/orgpath/drift-engine-config.schema.json)
- **Dialect:** `https://json-schema.org/draft/2020-12/schema`
- **`$id`:** `https://uiao.io/schemas/orgpath/drift-engine-config.schema.json`
:::

## Description

Declares participating phase adapters and the op-type → drift_class + severity mapping the engine applies when building the unified finding stream. Bound to UIAO_163 by ADR-040.

## Top-Level Properties

| Property | Type | Required | Description |
|---|---|:---:|---|
| `schema_version` | string | ✓ |  |
| `document_id` | `const: 'UIAO_163'` | ✓ |  |
| `parent_canon` | string | ✓ |  |
| `updated` | string |  |  |
| `defaults` | object | ✓ |  |
| `phases` | array&lt;`$ref: #/$defs/phase`&gt; | ✓ |  |
| `severity_policy` | object | ✓ |  |

## Full Schema

```{.json filename="drift-engine-config.schema.json"}
{
  "$schema": "https://json-schema.org/draft/2020-12/schema",
  "$id": "https://uiao.io/schemas/orgpath/drift-engine-config.schema.json",
  "title": "UIAO OrgTree Drift Engine Configuration",
  "description": "Declares participating phase adapters and the op-type \u2192 drift_class + severity mapping the engine applies when building the unified finding stream. Bound to UIAO_163 by ADR-040.",
  "type": "object",
  "additionalProperties": false,
  "required": [
    "schema_version",
    "document_id",
    "parent_canon",
    "defaults",
    "phases",
    "severity_policy"
  ],
  "properties": {
    "schema_version": {
      "type": "string",
      "pattern": "^[0-9]+\\.[0-9]+\\.[0-9]+$"
    },
    "document_id": {
      "const": "UIAO_163"
    },
    "parent_canon": {
      "type": "string"
    },
    "updated": {
      "type": "string",
      "format": "date"
    },
    "defaults": {
      "type": "object",
      "additionalProperties": false,
      "required": [
        "dry_run",
        "severity_floor",
        "halt_on_critical"
      ],
      "properties": {
        "dry_run": {
          "type": "boolean"
        },
        "severity_floor": {
          "enum": [
            "P1",
            "P2",
            "P3",
            "P4"
          ]
        },
        "halt_on_critical": {
          "type": "boolean"
        }
      }
    },
    "phases": {
      "type": "array",
      "minItems": 1,
      "uniqueItems": true,
      "items": {
        "$ref": "#/$defs/phase"
      }
    },
    "severity_policy": {
      "type": "object",
      "additionalProperties": false,
      "required": [
        "P1",
        "P2",
        "P3",
        "P4",
        "halt_at"
      ],
      "properties": {
        "P1": {
          "type": "string",
          "minLength": 1
        },
        "P2": {
          "type": "string",
          "minLength": 1
        },
        "P3": {
          "type": "string",
          "minLength": 1
        },
        "P4": {
          "type": "string",
          "minLength": 1
        },
        "halt_at": {
          "enum": [
            "P1",
            "P2",
            "P3",
            "P4"
          ]
        }
      }
    }
  },
  "$defs": {
    "phase": {
      "type": "object",
      "additionalProperties": false,
      "required": [
        "name",
        "adapter_module",
        "adapter_class",
        "op_map"
      ],
      "properties": {
        "name": {
          "type": "string",
          "pattern": "^mod-[a-z]-[a-z0-9-]+$"
        },
        "adapter_module": {
          "type": "string",
          "pattern": "^uiao\\.adapters\\."
        },
        "adapter_class": {
          "type": "string",
          "pattern": "^[A-Z][A-Za-z0-9]+$"
        },
        "op_map": {
          "type": "array",
          "minItems": 1,
          "uniqueItems": true,
          "items": {
            "$ref": "#/$defs/opEntry"
          }
        }
      }
    },
    "opEntry": {
      "type": "object",
      "additionalProperties": false,
      "required": [
        "op",
        "drift_class",
        "severity",
        "auto_remediate"
      ],
      "properties": {
        "op": {
          "type": "string",
          "minLength": 1
        },
        "drift_class": {
          "enum": [
            "DRIFT-SCHEMA",
            "DRIFT-SEMANTIC",
            "DRIFT-PROVENANCE",
            "DRIFT-AUTHZ",
            "DRIFT-IDENTITY",
            "DRIFT-BOUNDARY"
          ]
        },
        "severity": {
          "enum": [
            "P1",
            "P2",
            "P3",
            "P4"
          ]
        },
        "auto_remediate": {
          "type": "boolean"
        }
      }
    }
  }
}
```
